name: Create Moon Phases Diagram Lesson
description: An 8th grade earth science teacher needs a lesson on the lunar cycle. Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart containing a title page ('Moon Phases') noting the ~29.5-day cycle, a visual diagram using shapes and text labels for all eight phases (New Moon, Waxing Crescent, First Quarter, Waxing Gibbous, Full Moon, Waning Gibbous, Third Quarter, Waning Crescent), an explanation page titled 'Why' or 'Explanation' referencing the Sun and Earth, and a student activity page titled 'Activity' or 'Challenge' for sequencing the phases. Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/moon_phases_lesson.flipchart.
